title: Bosch Professional 2608577188 10-Piece PointTeQ HSS Twist Bit (for Metal, 2 x 24 x 49 mm, Drill Driver Accessories), ø 2 mm
features: Saves time: The HSS Twist Drill Bit PointTeQ with reduced shank enables you to drill through metal quickly thanks to the special design of the drill bit tip
High durability: The increased speed of the drill bit means less heat is built up, reducing wear
Precision work: The self-centering PointTeq tip design prevents slipping and allows an easy and efficient start

Compatibility: Suitable for all drill drivers, bench drills and rotary combi drills for making holes and centre holes through alloyed and mild steel, non-ferrous metals, cast steel, cast iron and plastic
Scope of delivery: 10 x PointTeQ HSS Twist Drill Bit with round shank - 2 x 24 x 49 mm
description: From the manufacturer About us Bosch offers innovative products and services for industry and trade. Bosch develops innovative, high-quality power tools with which you are guaranteed to achieve professional results in all craft areas. Our devices are reliable, powerful and robust, meet the highest demands and make your work easier. The Bosch battery devices are characterised by their long service life, high performance and very long mileage.
